item.title: 1974 Cadillac Fleetwood Spotlight
item.description: Explore the luxury and presence of the 1974 Cadillac Fleetwood with its signature styling and comfort features. What makes this Cadillac memorable?

item.title: 1968 Indy 500 Turbine Race Car
item.description: A look at the innovative 1968 Indy 500 turbine-powered race car and the engineering ideas that made it stand out. What made this design so revolutionary?

item.title: Factory Rear Open Roof Station Wagon
item.description: Exploring a rare station wagon design featuring a factory rear open-roof configuration built for utility and style. What made this feature so unusual for its time?

item.title: 1968 Ford Mustang GTCS
item.description: Featuring the 1968 Ford Mustang GT/CS, also known as the California Special, blending sporty styling with unique regional flair. What makes the GT/CS stand apart from other Mustangs?

item.title: A Rare 1964 Bill Thomas Cheetah
item.description: A spotlight on the rare 1964 Bill Thomas Cheetah, a lightweight performance machine created to challenge sports car rivals of its era. Why is the Cheetah so legendary today?

item.title: Cruising in a Turquoise ’57 with 1950s Style
item.description: A ride back into the spirit of the 1950s with a beautifully styled turquoise classic capturing the era’s design and personality. What made cars from this period so unforgettable?

item.title: 1967 Plymouth GTX 426 HEMI 4-Speed
